column8: Yellowish brown, generally silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)

Moderately strong, brownish pink to grey fine to coarse GRAINITE, moderately decomposed medium to coarse GRAINED GRANITE becoming fresh to moderately decomposed, closely jointed, dipping at low angle to very narrow, rough planar. Biotite, chlorite and kaolin coated joints, dipping at 10-20 degrees to 60-70 degrees and occasionally vertical joints.
